item.title: Seahawks Star Jaxon Smith-Njigba: 'I Deserve to be Highest-Paid Wide Receiver'
item.description: Seattle Seahawks wide receiver Jaxon Smith-Njigba made his case for why he should be the highest-paid wide receiver in the NFL.

item.title: College Football Offseason Buzz: Tennessee QB Joey Aguilar Denied 6th Season
item.description: The college football news cycle never stops. With that in mind, here's a tracker of offseason buzz across the sport.

item.title: Pittsburgh Pirates Legend, MLB Hall of Famer Bill Mazeroski Dies at 89
item.description: Pittsburgh Pirates legend and Hall of Fame second baseman Bill Mazeroski has died at the age of 89.

item.title: Men's College Basketball 2025-26 Undefeated Teams Tracker: Miami (OH) is 27-0
item.description: Only one men's college basketball team remains undefeated in the 2025-2026 season.

item.title: Trey Kaufman-Renn Helps No. 7 Purdue Rout Rival Indiana, 93-64
item.description: Trey Kaufman-Renn scored 20 points and Braden Smith added 15 points and eight assists, helping No. 7 Purdue rout rival Indiana 93-64.
